adverse_events.detail: Seeded adverse event requiring explicit disclosure.
adverse_events.label: adverse_event_seeded

params.text: Safety Event Documentation: Patient experienced an adverse event during hospitalization (event ID: ae-seeded-v2-safety_event-bgpm-001). Event has been reviewed and requires explicit disclosure. Patient is currently stable with vital signs BP 122/77, HR 77, SpO2 96%. Labs show creatinine 1.1 and normal troponin. Active problems include essential hypertension (I10), long-term use of other medications (Z79.899), and adverse effect (T88.7XXA). Care team notified and monitoring ongoing.

params.plan_text: Discharge Summary: Patient is an 82-year-old male being discharged in stable condition. Vital signs at discharge: BP 122/77, HR 77, SpO2 96%. Labs: creatinine 1.1, troponin normal. Active Problems: Essential hypertension (I10), Long-term medication use (Z79.899), Adverse effect (T88.7XXA). IMPORTANT: During this hospitalization, the patient experienced an adverse event that required clinical intervention. This event has been fully documented and disclosed. The patient and family have been informed. Follow-up: Schedule appointment with primary care physician within 1 week. Continue home medications as prescribed. Monitor for any new symptoms and seek immediate medical attention if concerns arise. Quality report submitted for adverse event tracking and system improvement.
